realistic.name: steady_portrait
realistic.prompt: A person smiling softly at the camera. They maintain gentle eye contact and natural facial expressions while standing in a softly lit environment. The camera is steady, medium close-up, realistic cinematic style.

realistic.name: viewpoint_turn
realistic.prompt: A person slowly turns from a three-quarter side profile toward the camera and smiles naturally. Soft studio lighting, realistic cinematic portrait, subtle head motion.

realistic.name: occlusion_reappearance
realistic.prompt: A person walks through a busy city street at night. Passing pedestrians briefly occlude the face before the person reappears and looks toward the camera, realistic cinematic style.

realistic.name: background_shift
realistic.prompt: A person standing in a rainy Tokyo street at night, softly smiling at the camera. Neon lights reflect on the wet pavement, cinematic realistic style.
